post.summary: Logs the user in providing a Jwt bearer token
post.description:
The Token result should be used in future requests by adding a header which is:




```Authorization: Bearer {Token}```

The APIKey result should be used in future requests by adding a header which is:

```Authorization: FIOAPIKey {APIKey}```

AllowWrites.description: If this APIKey should allow writes

CreateTime.description: The time of APIKey creation in Utc

AllData.description: An "AllData" payload - All available data on the user

Errors.description: Any errors with the associated username

RegistrationTime.description: The time when registration was requested

Pioneers.description: The number of pioneers this building uses

Settlers.description: The number of settlers this building uses

Technicians.description: The number of technicians this building uses

Engineers.description: The number of engineers this building uses

Scientists.description: The number of scientists this building uses

AreaCost.description: The area cost of this building

Amount.description: The amount of the material required

DurationMs.description: Duration of the recipe in milliseconds

Errors.description: Any errors with the associated username

Any errors with the associated username

PartnerUserName.description: PartnerUserName - This requires that the user in question has been parsed by FIOAPI once (via USR buffer)

Errors.description: Any errors with the associated username

CurrencyDecimals.description: Decimals to show for this currency

ApplicationName.description: The application name for the APIkey

AllowWrites.description: If this APIKey will allow writes

Admin.description: If the user should be admin

Bot.description: If the user should be a bot

CreateAccount.description: The payload for admin account creation

GroupId.description: The GroupId of the new group

Errors.description: Any errors with the associated username

Ticker.description: The ticker for an FX entry `XXX/YYY`

FinishedRequestPayload.description: The response from a finished request

UserName.description: The username (or * for all users) to grant permission to

MemberUserNames.description: Retrieves a list of member UserNames

Admin.description: If the invite is for an admin role

InitialState.description: The initial state of the request logger

Admin.description: If this is an invite for an admin role

Path.description: The path of the endpoint, including query params

LoginResponse.description: The response from a login request

Weight.description: Weight of the material in tons

Volume.description: Volume of the material in m^3

IsResource.description: If it's a resource extractable from a planet

ResourceType.description: The resource type of the material

InfrastructureUsage.description: If this material is used in infrastructure

COGCUsage.description: If this material is used in COGC

WorkforceUsage.description: If this material is used for workforces

PlanetCOGCVote.description: A vote on a COGC Program

Materials.description: The material tickers to search for

ConcentrationThreshold.description: Omit any material results with a concentration less than this value

MustHaveLocalMarket.description: The planet must have a local market

MustHaveChamberOfCommerce.description: The planet must have a chamber of global commerce

MustHaveWarehouse.description: The planet must have a warehouse

MustHaveAdministrationCenter.description: The planet must have an administration center

MustHaveShipyard.description: The planet must have a shipyard

DistanceChecks.description: Where to do distance checks from (maximum 10)

JumpDistanceThreshold.description: The jump distance threshold from the source below

JumpDistanceThresholdSource.description: What source to threshold from. Can be SystemID, System Name, Planet Name, Planet NaturalId, Planet Id

PlanetSearch.description: The payload search payload to POST

DistanceResults.description: The distance results, in jump distance

OwnerCode.description: OwnerCode: CompanyCode if player is active, null if liquidated, naturalId if planetary project

GhostPlot.description: If this plot is a GhostPlot

Slots.description: Slots - Not sure what this represents

Errors.description: Any errors with the associated username
Any errors with the associated username

Information.description: Information such as Ship name, registration, specs (acceleration, mass, etc)

Repair.description: Information such as ship condition, last repair, and materials needed to repair

FlightSTLFactor.description: How fast ships fly through STL space

FlightFTLFactor.description: How fast ships fly through FTL space

ParsecLength.description: How long a single parsec is

Errors.description: Any errors with the associated username

Buildings.description: The general building information (effectively, building ticker)

ProductionLines.description: Production line information. This includes all active and pending orders

Fixed.description: Fixed - If it's a fixed/stationary store

TradeStore.description: TradeStore - If you can trade from it. Only fuel tanks cannot.

Locked.description: Locked - If the store is locked (warehouse not payed)

Type.description: Type - STORE, WAREHOUSE_STORE, STL_FUEL_STORE, FTL_FUEL_STORE, VORTEX_FUEL_STORE

Errors.description: Any errors with the associated username

Location.description: The location of all your storage (inventory and warehouse)

Information.description: Information about the storage (Weight/Volume capacity, warehouse or base storage, etc)

Items.description: Inventory items. This also implies actual weight/volume permissions

UserName.description: The username of the person being invited

Admin.description: If this is an invite for an admin role

LastTickTime.description: LastTickTime - When consumables were last pulled from this site

Errors.description: Any errors with the associated username

Level.description: The "level" or name of the workforce tier (PIONEER, SETTLER, etc)

Needs.description: The workforce needs for this tier of workers

Bearer.description:
Authorization header using Bearer scheme. Example:

`Authorization: Bearer {token}`

**NOTE:** When authenticating through the documentation page, do not include 'Bearer'.

FIOAPIKey.description:
Authorization header using FIOAPIKey scheme.
Example:

`Authorization: FIOAPIKey {APIKey}`

**NOTE:** When authenticating through the documentation page, make sure the input is `FIOAPIKey {Key}`.
FIOAPIKey.name: Authorization
